title: pdf report showing subtasks assigned to a person
excerpt: I’d like to automate creating a .pdf report for each person on my team, showing not “done” subtasks in the groups that I choose.  Existing export to .pdf and excel functions aren’t allowing me to filter by not “done”

posts.author: JMKenney (Jeff Kenney)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to automate creating a .pdf report for each person on my team, showing not “done” subtasks in the groups that I choose. Existing export to .pdf and excel functions aren’t allowing me to filter by not “done”

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JMKenney.

Could you build a dashboard per person with the filter already applied at the top of the board in the settings? perhaps if you share more detail can help!

image574×222 13.2 KB

Then set each to export weekly>?
